message:
feat(runtime): tick events now flow through model.update() (bd-3ufh)

- Add Event::Tick variant to ftui-core event enum
- Runtime main loop now calls model.update() with tick message
- Add inject_event() helper to simulator for single event injection
- Add RecordingFilter handling for Event::Tick (not recorded)
- Add comprehensive tests for tick delivery and behavior

This enables periodic model logic without external input, resolving
the issue where Cmd::Tick only triggered redraws without the model
seeing a tick message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
